name: Tiri's Garden Farmers Market
notes: On-file website (concertsforkids.org) redirects to ampthecause.org, which returns an SSL certificate mismatch error (cert is for *.squarespace.com, not ampthecause.org) and whose reachable subpages (about-us/meet-the-team, volunteer, our-events/community-day) make no mention of Tiri's Garden or a farmers market. Concerts for Kids appears to have rebranded to Amp the Cause and no longer runs this market. All substantive details found (location at 15th & California St, Wed 11am-4pm, vendors, season through Sept 28) trace to a single Denver Westword article from June 9, 2010 -- not a current official source. No official Facebook or Instagram page could be located; a search hit for facebook.com/tari.farms is unrelated. Third-party aggregator sites (givinggarden.io, localharvest.org, coloradolandcan.org, farmersmarketonline.com) list the market but with no verifiable current/official sourcing, and one 2026-dated aggregator (milehighonthecheap.com) does not include it in its current Denver-area market list at all, suggesting it may be defunct. No fields could be confirmed from a legitimate official source, so none are filled.
